ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., action, comedy, drama) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the movie has received */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is featured on the platform */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the actor in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the actor in kilograms */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the actor's profile image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the actor is currently active in the industry */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards the actor has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the character appears in */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor who plays the character */,
  "is_main" INTEGER /* Indicates if the character is a main character */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the character's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actor" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character played by the actor in the movie */,
  "is_lead" INTEGER /* Indicates if the actor is a lead actor in the movie */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., main, supporting, cameo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actor_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "followed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor or movie being followed */,
  "follow_type" TEXT /* Type of the followed entity (e.g., actor, movie) */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the user followed the actor or movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "followed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
